'''Nonce''' was a [[Radnoran]] who was in detention most of his life on [[Radnor/Legends|Radnor]]. During the [[Mission to Radnor]], when a toxin was released on Radnor, [[Ruuin]], a Radnoran raider who worked for the [[Avoni]], who wanted to invade the planet, claimed that he was paid a wage and a share of the spoils by Nonce. Ruuin also claimed that somebody else hired and gave Nonce access to the official evacuation plans.

{{Char-stub}}
